name: Fresh Tomato Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and shortening together until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Sift in the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, nutmeg, and salt) and mix until just combined.
4. Stir in the chopped tomatoes, nuts, dates, and raisins.
5. Grease and flour a 9-inch baking pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Frost with cream cheese frosting once cooled.
